title: SentinelState
description: Cached per-PR state for bin/ci-sentinel.sh. Used to detect transitions between polls.

pr_number.description: PR number. 0 is reserved (v1.13.0 P8) for a per-repo daemon-liveness record that carries the `daemon` block instead of real PR state; all per-PR records are >= 1.

daemon.description: Optional per-repo daemon liveness block written by bin/sentinel-daemon.sh when the supervised --daemon-loop is running. Additive (v1.13.0 P8): absent for one-shot polls. Distinct from the per-PR transition fields above — it records the lifecycle of the supervising loop, not a single PR.

pid.description: PID of the supervised ci-sentinel.sh --daemon-loop process.

supervisor.description: Which supervisor launched the loop. launchd on macOS, systemd user unit on Linux, nohup as the documented best-effort fallback.
